name: cashsnap_two_stage_balanced_real_p24_trueempty_proposal_gate_browser_stack_rej080

evidence.summary: Balanced real p24 detector plus true-empty gate with reject>=0.80 is the current safer browser-deployable product operating point. Versus the older reject>=0.99 point, full real post-gate exact-value images improve 1209 -> 1232, background-FP images improve 79 -> 58, mean USD/KHR absolute value errors improve 7.70/1523 -> 7.03/1302, while object recall drops 0.9486 -> 0.9376. Strict clean exact-value improves 664 -> 668 and background-FP images improve 13 -> 10, with recall 0.9574 -> 0.9541.

known_limits: Diagnostic stack only; not production-ready and not overlap/fan/hand capable.
This tuned threshold spends detector recall to improve count/value and background behavior; full real USD_100 recall drops versus reject>=0.99.
Full real val/test still contains mixed-source, empty-label, KHR_100, and cross-split issues documented in real_data_label_audit_v1.
Current 13-class schema cannot encode KHR_100 or other out-of-scope banknotes.
The gate rejects proposals but does not correct denomination classes.
